heading: Executive departments
label: 101 Executive departments
text: The Executive departments are:The Department of State.The Department of the Treasury.The Department of Defense.The Department of Justice.The Department of the Interior.The Department of Agriculture.The Department of Commerce.The Department of Labor.The Department of Health and Human Services.The Department of Housing and Urban Development.The Department of Transportation.The Department of Energy.The Department of Education.The Department of Veterans Affairs.The Department of Homeland Security.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large .5 U.S.C. 1R.S. § 158.(38th through 54th words), .Feb. 9, 1889, ch. 122, § 125 Stat. 659(83d through 99th words), .Feb. 14, 1903, ch. 552, § 132 Stat. 825(75th through 91st words), .Mar. 4, 1913, ch. 141, § 137 Stat. 736“Sec. 201(c)”, .Aug. 10, 1949, ch. 412, § 463 Stat. 579, .July 31, 1956, ch. 802, § 1(a)70 Stat. 732 .5 U.S.C. 2R.S. § 159.The reference in former section 1 to the application of the provisions of this title, referring to title IV of the Revised Statutes, is omitted as unnecessary as the application of those provisions is stated in the text.The statement in former section 2 that the use of the word “department” means one of the Executive departments named in former section 1 is omitted as unnecessary as the words “Executive department” are used in this title when Executive department is meant.“The Department of Commerce” is substituted for “The Department of Commerce and Labor” on authority of the , .act of March 4, 1913, ch. 141, § 137 Stat. 736
Editorial Notes

Amendments2006— inserted “The Department of Homeland Security.”Pub. L. 109–2411988— inserted “The Department of Veterans Affairs.”Pub. L. 100–5271979— substituted “Department of Health and Human Services” for “Department of Health, Education, and Welfare” and inserted “The Department of Education.”Pub. L. 96–881977— inserted “The Department of Energy.”Pub. L. 95–911970— struck out “The Post Office Department.”Pub. L. 91–3751966— inserted “The Department of Housing and Urban Development.” and “The Department of Transportation.”Pub. L. 89–670
